cf-568c-a1f2-246115ec722c","0b40e8b0-7fc1-5cdd-833b-2e45d07238f2","21b05651-8d81-5f25-92b9-6334e1bc02eb","d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722","d55a8dfc-f66a-508e-a059-6cad31beac45","2ec772ba-0bbe-5e56-a368-b74183be3667","e1ac2d44-207f-5037-a990-42e269fddf04","f19d3e67-bc45-558b-937c-7d1e724eec4d","5fc00d45-950d-5b9f-9bbe-fcec4e3f0887","7816deb1-30cb-5380-8765-fc240a588596","1e7de566-ca82-5ba1-bcb4-ee1c31729f85","d72f7c30-26e1-53c7-ac16-898fa7cccf2b","87cdb2e4-db12-5625-91a8-05eb5a99a0ad","72eb3d02-120d-5cd9-872f-55e858217113","3f220f66-638e-5a00-bcf4-faffad55c121","3213a47b-97f1-5ca4-8c50-bb3520c447cb","dad291fb-c69d-5b17-ae4b-8da5b9af64e4","432ae752-17df-54a3-9c6c-22a007bdb6d7","41dd5cf2-fb2d-5045-982e-215e3d4f43d5","fc1b727f-02a7-5105-8fa9-3fe8820f555f","9e46de3f-5833-55b9-9e9e-4f0d566beba7","ea2960ca-00a8-5290-87d0-581e504d127d","83e53dd7-f9ad-564d-976d-c21dfb6f32ba","bd53692b-6a59-5da7-9bdb-f765170f19ee","37c6c2b7-64c0-50cf-a712-17e0c44ec97c"],"pa":["67f70886-e1ac-5e07-a166-1e5b14c1d481","92a4dca1-4d43-5cb1-80ca-4f01b31f39dc","127b465c-09ff-555a-a5cf-a4567b615d2d","48267f63-09f1-5cd1-bac2-8027e4718e0e","5de12995-6e67-59e6-9539-e82c3d7f17a6","cfaf2455-641a-5f9a-90a9-e52bd758a05f","e0a04a58-025f-59a9-9fde-77547b407a57","ce4fafa1-1b3a-5232-96ba-500166878a9c","55d49547-0bfd-5800-b1cc-184feb43600d","c6ded78f-40c2-522c-97a2-977243b7a5e8","a3d100d5-b243-511d-9e70-c72d4a2bd6a5","d8a0acc5-3f13-5300-817c-e1c61619bcfd","16beb9d1-7995-5525-8182-64233930f759","908b1f80-93d4-51b1-8c7f-15aca5d1c474","027f8aa1-3e2b-5a35-bdd5-1a63d264f77f","3366ea7d-1ca2-5e71-9455-42c11b48592b","a8e8035c-1872-5ab3-a581-1b0bc8a6f03b","77e3264a-467c-5815-8b31-067d67bb5264","24048476-bd2a-5ae2-a98d-c6c0667f7ae3","60e62ae6-975c-52c6-8b8d-3dbe0742e828","cf73d188-1b2c-5ec8-af77-228881dccf79","8c3e6cdb-eece-5b5d-802c-cce2808d6fe7","0a92d5b8-34cf-568c-a1f2-246115ec722c","0b40e8b0-7fc1-5cdd-833b-2e45d07238f2","21b05651-8d81-5f25-92b9-6334e1bc02eb","d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722","d55a8dfc-f66a-508e-a059-6cad31beac45","2ec772ba-0bbe-5e56-a368-b74183be3667","e1ac2d44-207f-5037-a990-42e269fddf04","f19d3e67-bc45-558b-937c-7d1e724eec4d","5fc00d45-950d-5b9f-9bbe-fcec4e3f0887","7816deb1-30cb-5380-8765-fc240a588596","1e7de566-ca82-5ba1-bcb4-ee1c31729f85","d72f7c30-26e1-53c7-ac16-898fa7cccf2b","87cdb2e4-db12-5625-91a8-05eb5a99a0ad","72eb3d02-120d-5cd9-872f-55e858217113","3f220f66-638e-5a00-bcf4-faffad55c121","3213a47b-97f1-5ca4-8c50-bb3520c447cb","dad291fb-c69d-5b17-ae4b-8da5b9af64e4","432ae752-17df-54a3-9c6c-22a007bdb6d7","41dd5cf2-fb2d-5045-982e-215e3d4f43d5","fc1b727f-02a7-5105-8fa9-3fe8820f555f","9e46de3f-5833-55b9-9e9e-4f0d566beba7","ea2960ca-00a8-5290-87d0-581e504d127d","83e53dd7-f9ad-564d-976d-c21dfb6f32ba","bd53692b-6a59-5da7-9bdb-f765170f19ee","37c6c2b7-64c0-50cf-a712-17e0c44ec97c"],"pat":["67f70886-e1ac-5e07-a166-1e5b14c1d481","92a4dca1-4d43-5cb1-80ca-4f01b31f39dc","127b465c-09ff-555a-a5cf-a4567b615d2d","48267f63-09f1-5cd1-bac2-8027e4718e0e","5de12995-6e67-59e6-9539-e82c3d7f17a6","cfaf2455-641a-5f9a-90a9-e52bd758a05f","e0a04a58-025f-59a9-9fde-77547b407a57","ce4fafa1-1b3a-5232-96ba-500166878a9c","55d49547-0bfd-5800-b1cc-184feb43600d","c6ded78f-40c2-522c-97a2-977243b7a5e8","a3d100d5-b243-511d-9e70-c72d4a2bd6a5","d8a0acc5-3f13-5300-817c-e1c61619bcfd","16beb9d1-7995-5525-8182-64233930f759","908b1f80-93d4-51b1-8c7f-15aca5d1c474","027f8aa1-3e2b-5a35-bdd5-1a63d264f77f","3366ea7d-1ca2-5e71-9455-42c11b48592b","a8e8035c-1872-5ab3-a581-1b0bc8a6f03b","77e3264a-467c-5815-8b31-067d67bb5264","24048476-bd2a-5ae2-a98d-c6c0667f7ae3","60e62ae6-975c-52c6-8b8d-3dbe0742e828","cf73d188-1b2c-5ec8-af77-228881dccf79","8c3e6cdb-eece-5b5d-802c-cce2808d6fe7","0a92d5b8-34cf-568c-a1f2-246115ec722c","0b40e8b0-7fc1-5cdd-833b-2e45d07238f2","21b05651-8d81-5f25-92b9-6334e1bc02eb","d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722","d55a8dfc-f66a-508e-a059-6cad31beac45","2ec772ba-0bbe-5e56-a368-b74183be3667","e1ac2d44-207f-5037-a990-42e269fddf04","f19d3e67-bc45-558b-937c-7d1e724eec4d","5fc00d45-950d-5b9f f1-5cd1-bac2-8027e4718e0e"],"rus":["48267f63-09f1-5cd1-bac2-8027e4718e0e"],"rust":["48267f63-09f1-5cd1-bac2-8027e4718e0e"],"l":["7d7fb87f-6966-5e30-b97b-746bd3503d5d"],"lo":["7d7fb87f-6966-5e30-b97b-746bd3503d5d"],"log":["7d7fb87f-6966-5e30-b97b-746bd3503d5d"],"logi":["7d7fb87f-6966-5e30-b97b-746bd3503d5d"],"logic":["7d7fb87f-6966-5e30-b97b-746bd3503d5d"],"a":["7d7fb87f-6966-5e30-b97b-746bd3503d5d","41dd5cf2-fb2d-5045-982e-215e3d4f43d5"],"an":["7d7fb87f-6966-5e30-b97b-746bd3503d5d"],"and":["7d7fb87f-6966-5e30-b97b-746bd3503d5d"],"t":["cfaf2455-641a-5f9a-90a9-e52bd758a05f","2ec772ba-0bbe-5e56-a368-b74183be3667","87cdb2e4-db12-5625-91a8-05eb5a99a0ad","72eb3d02-120d-5cd9-872f-55e858217113"],"te":["cfaf2455-641a-5f9a-90a9-e52bd758a05f","2ec772ba-0bbe-5e56-a368-b74183be3667"],"tes":["cfaf2455-641a-5f9a-90a9-e52bd758a05f"],"test":["cfaf2455-641a-5f9a-90a9-e52bd758a05f"],"d":["16beb9d1-7995-5525-8182-64233930f759"],"di":["16beb9d1-7995-5525-8182-64233930f759"],"did":["16beb9d1-7995-5525-8182-64233930f759"],"ch":["8c3e6cdb-eece-5b5d-802c-cce2808d6fe7"],"cha":["8c3e6cdb-eece-5b5d-802c-cce2808d6fe7"],"chat":["8c3e6cdb-eece-5b5d-802c-cce2808d6fe7"],"chatg":["8c3e6cdb-eece-5b5d-802c-cce2808d6fe7"],"chatgp":["8c3e6cdb-eece-5b5d-802c-cce2808d6fe7"],"chatgpt":["8c3e6cdb-eece-5b5d-802c-cce2808d6fe7"],"f":["0a92d5b8-34cf-568c-a1f2-246115ec722c"],"fo":["0a92d5b8-34cf-568c-a1f2-246115ec722c"],"foa":["0a92d5b8-34cf-568c-a1f2-246115ec722c"],"foam":["0a92d5b8-34cf-568c-a1f2-246115ec722c"],"id":["0b40e8b0-7fc1-5cdd-833b-2e45d07238f2"],"ide":["0b40e8b0-7fc1-5cdd-833b-2e45d07238f2"],"idea":["0b40e8b0-7fc1-5cdd-833b-2e45d07238f2"],"ideas":["0b40e8b0-7fc1-5cdd-833b-2e45d07238f2"],"o":["d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722"],"or":["d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722"],"ori":["d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722"],"orig":["d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722"],"origi":["d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722"],"origin":["d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae2a-1c3e142b4722"],"origina":["d86f7d27-5f3f-530f-ae
